Reviews Contact
Home / Services / Chimney Restoration

Chimney Restoration

Securing Philadelphia's chimney stacks against harsh winters and high winds.

Nor'easters topple dozens of Philadelphia chimneys each year. Our complete rebuilds use reinforced flue liners and aircraft cable bracing to prevent collapses. For brick chimneys in Chestnut Hill's stone homes, we carefully dismantle and rebuild section by section. In Fishtown's industrial conversions, we install stainless steel caps to prevent downdrafts.

We specialize in diagnosing subtle chimney leans - often the first sign of foundation issues in Philly's older homes. Thermal imaging helps identify heat-damaged mortar before it becomes hazardous. All work complies with Philadelphia's strict masonry code for attached dwellings, including firestop installation between row houses.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Remove compromised bricks/coping stones
  2. 02 Step 2: Install seismic reinforcement system
  3. 03 Step 3: Rebuild with high-temp refractory mortar
  4. 04 Step 4: Seal against water penetration

Benefits

  • Prevents dangerous collapses
  • Improves draft efficiency
  • Reduces creosote buildup
  • Maintains property values

Frequently Asked Questions

How urgent is chimney repair in Philadelphia?

Any visible lean or loose bricks requires immediate attention - winter winds can topple unstable stacks onto rowhouse roofs.

Do you work on industrial flues in converted factories?

Yes, we've restored dozens of Northern Liberties loft chimneys using specialized high-capacity liners.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with chimney restoration? Contact us today.

Request Quote Or call: 555-mas-r93
